text:
いたっ！
ちょっと、遠慮無さすぎじゃない！？

/ci1 2 申し訳ありません！
しかし、エフィメラの力を
弱めることができればきっと……！

OUCH! Hey, I said don't hold back, but that's
a bit much, don't you think!?

/ci1 2 Forgive me! However, if we could just weaken
the power of the Ephemera...!
